programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Peter, a newly divorced father, is looking for a fresh start; Dallas trust fund couple, Brad and Heather, want to upgrade their family to their first mega mansion.

programme.title: Find Me a Luxury Home
programme.desc: Hoping for a spectacular kitchen, South African author Philippa looks at three ultimate luxury homes in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: The Soleal travesl to fascinating ports along Europe's coastline from Portugal to Iceland that will trace the Celtic roots of these historic parts of the world.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: Hollywood royalty in Lake Como; relaxing in Stockholm.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Travel to some of the world's most secluded and private islands.

programme.title: Behind the Gates
programme.desc: Gary Takle tours through the home of interior designer to the stars, Monica Suleski, on the Florida Coast.

programme.title: Travel Thru History
programme.desc: Learning about how the Hoover Dam was built, why it's necessary, and a behind the scenes look at its inner workings.

programme.title: 5 Star Getaways
programme.desc: This series is a sun-filled invitation to travel and visit magnificent all-inclusive 5-star resorts throughout the world, their magnificent surroundings and the exciting excursions one can do at each destination.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.desc: New Caledonia native and professional surfer, Sarah Houser takes Nikki on a SUP and surf adventure in New Caledonia.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dream Purchase
programme.desc: Dream Purchase follows the realization of an American dream; everyone has dreamed of owning that special thing; for some its a classic car, for others a luxury home and for some even a helicopter or luxury yacht.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: In stunning Lago di Garda Jonathan attempts to pull off a paragliding maneuver which almost put him in a wet grave last summer. Nearby, in the city of Bolzano, he joins a crack helicopter rescue force to pull another paraglider off the cliffs.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: A look at what are considered to be some of the best cruises in the world.

programme.title: Global Passport
programme.desc: Christina Cindrich visits Guadalajara, Mexico, the home of tequila and mariachi; with its colorful murals, colonial architecture and fascinating history, it is a destination that should be on every traveler's bucket list.

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: Jeanie visits Nice while Janez heads home to South Africa.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: Thawing out in the Cayman Islands after staying in the Ice Hotel.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.sub-title: Shark Electrosensory Experiment+Oil Platforms in the Gulf of Mexico+Night Diving
programme.desc: Dr. Stephen Kajiura tests how well sharks can detect electrical fields; learning how to use a Mark V commercial diving helmet; exploring how oil platforms in the Gulf of Mexico can become artificial reefs.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Off the coast of Australia, Lizard Island is a place of luxury, privacy and pure relaxation.

programme.title: Behind the Gates
programme.desc: An original Hampton's rebuild situated in the heart of Southampton; a Hampton's replica next to the home of Bill Gates; an iconic estate with views of the Seattle skyline.

programme.title: Travel Thru History
programme.desc: Independence hall, the liberty bell, Elfreth's alley, the Philadelphia Museum of Art and America's first penitentiary, Eastern State.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: Cruising the luxury riverboat Aqua for an intimate encounter with the Peruvian Amazon, taking daily excursions deep into the rainforest with monkeys, piranhas, pink dolphins and more.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Allie and Marco consider a luxurious Miami Beach townhouse; California couple Callie and Steve want to move to Orange County.

programme.title: Find Me a Luxury Home
programme.desc: Kathy is a successful stylist to the stars and is looking for the ultimate luxury home to entertain her family and friends; three amazing homes in some very upscale L.A. neighborhoods.

programme.title: Dream Purchase
programme.desc: Dream Purchase follows the realization of an American dream. Everyone has dreamed of owning that special thing. For some its a classic car, for others a luxury home and for some even a helicopter or luxury yacht.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Off the coast of Australia, Lizard Island is a place of luxury, privacy and pure relaxation.

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc: Sheryl and Paul Shard voyage to exotic destinations.

programme.title: Global Passport
programme.desc: Christina Cindrich visits Guadalajara, Mexico, the home of tequila and mariachi; with its colorful murals, colonial architecture and fascinating history, it is a destination that should be on every traveler's bucket list.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.desc: The BIC SUP Team explore the beautiful island of Barbados in search of the perfect wave.

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: Jeanie visits Nice while Janez heads home to South Africa.

programme.title: Find Me a Beach House
programme.desc: Joe and Mercedes try to find a house big enough for all their friends and family by the water.

programme.title: Selling Jets
programme.desc: Robert and Susan consider purchasing a jet once owned by Sam Walton; they are looking to step up from their single-engine plane to a business jet.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: Thawing out in the Cayman Islands after staying in the Ice Hotel.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan digs around the Flanders exploring Western Europe's least understood region. He discovers how a Christmas cookie has turned into a spreading sensation and discovers a ghost town of automobiles with a mysterious past.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Allie and Marco consider a luxurious Miami Beach townhouse; California couple Callie and Steve want to move to Orange County.

programme.title: Dream Purchase
programme.desc: Dream Purchase follows the realization of an American dream. Everyone has dreamed of owning that special thing. For some its a classic car, for others a luxury home and for some even a helicopter or luxury yacht.

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc: Sheryl and Paul Shard voyage to exotic destinations.

programme.title: Boys Toys
programme.desc: Up close and personal with some of the finest sports toys on the planet, from electric waterboards to classic custom cars.

programme.title: Dream Purchase
programme.desc: Dream Purchase follows the realization of an American dream. Everyone has dreamed of owning that special thing. For some its a classic car, for others a luxury home and for some even a helicopter or luxury yacht.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan digs around the Flanders exploring Western Europe's least understood region. He discovers how a Christmas cookie has turned into a spreading sensation and discovers a ghost town of automobiles with a mysterious past.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: A look at what are considered to be some of the best cruises in the world.

programme.title: Global Passport
programme.desc: Christina Cindrich visits the Amalfi Coast in Italy; this 25 mile-long stretch of postcard-perfect coastal towns have been a magnet for the jet-set and are easily one of the most beautiful regions in the whole world.

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: Tapestry and weaving lessons; ancient castles.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: Every year the rich and famous head to St. Tropez to sunbathe; the temples in Sri Lanka.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.sub-title: Muck Diving in the Philippines + The Annual Alewife Run in Maine, USA
programme.desc: Following muck diving in the Philippines, searching for one of the rarest octopuses in the world, the Wunderpus. Then traveling to Maine in the USA for the annual Alewife Run and witnessing hundreds of thousands of fish moving upstream to spawn.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Amber Coco Plum, an adult-only resort in Belize, to learn about its history and to tour its secluded cabanas; Amber visits ancient Mayan ruins; Amber zips through the Belize rainforest.

programme.title: Behind the Gates
programme.desc: A tour of a custom Mediterranean estate, a penthouse with 360 degree views of the strip and a contemporary home with it's own genre.

programme.title: Travel Thru History
programme.desc: Standing on the stage of the Grand Ole Opry; visiting the home of the 7th US President Andrew Jackson; visiting the largest recreation of the Parthenon outside of Greece.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: With 780 cabins and accommodations to more than 1,500 passengers, the elegant Italian MSC Lirica will cruise the West Indies; ports-of-call are Dominican Republic, Saint Martin, Martinique, Guadeloupe, Antigua, and Tortola.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Marco and Allie tour the Pine Tree Rat Pack house with Tara West; Steve makes his last pitch to convince Allie to leave San Diego.

programme.title: Find Me a Luxury Home
programme.desc: Interested in entertaining, successful interior designer Cathy looks at three luxury homes in upscale Los Angeles neighborhoods.

programme.title: Dream Purchase
programme.desc: Dream Purchase follows the realization of an American dream; everyone has dreamed of owning that special thing; for some its a classic car, for others a luxury home and for some even a helicopter or luxury yacht.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Amber Coco Plum, an adult-only resort in Belize, to learn about its history and to tour its secluded cabanas; Amber visits ancient Mayan ruins; Amber zips through the Belize rainforest.

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc: Paul and Sheryl Shard are on a diverse voyage from England through the inland waterways of France to the Mediterranean Sea, an Atlantic crossing and island-hopping in the Caribbean aboard their 49-foot sailboat, Distant Shores II.

programme.title: Global Passport
programme.desc: Christina Cindrich visits the Amalfi Coast in Italy; this 25 mile-long stretch of postcard-perfect coastal towns have been a magnet for the jet-set and are easily one of the most beautiful regions in the whole world.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.desc: Nikki and guests explore the scenic white water creeks, rivers and lakes of Pennsylvania's beautiful Pocono Mountains.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: Tapestry and weaving lessons; ancient castles.

programme.title: Find Me a Beach House
programme.desc: Julie and David look for a home that can double as an investment as well as a forever home in Silicon Beach, Calif.

programme.title: Selling Jets
programme.desc: Mike is a yacht captain employed by a wealthy New York business executive to operate and maintain his luxury yacht based in the Bahamas; his employer has asked him to look into assisting him in purchasing a private jet.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: Every year the rich and famous head to St. Tropez to sunbathe; the temples in Sri Lanka.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan mounts a motorcycle to explore Scotland and visit to remote distilleries to savor never heard of scotch; he descends into the countries pagan past of druids, witches and sorcerers.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Marco and Allie tour the Pine Tree Rat Pack house with Tara West; Steve makes his last pitch to convince Allie to leave San Diego.

programme.title: Dream Purchase
programme.desc: Dream Purchase follows the realization of an American dream; everyone has dreamed of owning that special thing; for some its a classic car, for others a luxury home and for some even a helicopter or luxury yacht.

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc: Paul and Sheryl Shard are on a diverse voyage from England through the inland waterways of France to the Mediterranean Sea, an Atlantic crossing and island-hopping in the Caribbean aboard their 49-foot sailboat, Distant Shores II.

programme.title: Boys Toys
programme.desc: Showcasing a series of rarely seen toys.
